body:
## Summary
- Added `docs/auto-pr-smoke.md` for the sandbox auto-PR smoke test.
- Kept the change documentation-only with no workflow, config, secret, dependency, or production behavior changes.

## Verification
- `git status --short --untracked-files=all` showed only `docs/auto-pr-smoke.md`.
- `git ls-files --others --exclude-standard` showed only `docs/auto-pr-smoke.md`.
- `wc -l docs/auto-pr-smoke.md` reported 7 lines.

Closes #14
title: Add auto PR smoke test documentation
